data.title: Readmio: Bedtime Stories Aloud
data.description:
Bedtime stories and fairy tales with life lessons for kids. Read aloud and the app responds to your words with sounds and music. For a child, this is a magical audio experience with no screen time.

Reasons why you’ll love readmio
— We help build a positive attitude towards reading
— We create stories with the intention of supporting the mental and emotional development of children
— Our bedtime stories are short and easy to integrate with other activities
— Reading with sounds works offline (without wifi) and with your privacy in mind
— A varied selection of kids stories: Free stories, Folk tales, Aesop's fables, Christmas fairy tales and etc.
— We add new stories every week
— It’s fun not only for kids but also for parents and the whole family

By parents for parents
Readmio is an app full of fairy tales for kids that we have enriched with sounds. Just download the app, save a story to the library and start reading! While you read out loud, the app follows along and adds sounds at exactly the right moment.

A small theatre at home
Put your baby to sleep and instead of books, try to use our bedtime stories. And feel free to put into the storytelling, our sounds and music will help you. For example, try making different voices or facial expressions and make a small home theater for your baby. But we don't think that our app is a replacement for books, it’s an addition. We promote reading to children in any form.

Why there aren’t any illustrations in the stories?
The kids stories have beautiful cover illustrations that will help you and your children choose what you are going to read. However, the children's contact with the mobile phone should end there. In the stories themselves, we did not include illustrations intentionally because we do not want to support their time spent in front of the screen. 

Meaningful bedtime stories
We created Readmio because we believe in the power of bedtime stories. They form the basis of society and help to spread and maintain wisdom. For kids, they are an ideal tool not only for expanding vocabulary but also for explaining complicated topics. We recommend that you use our stories as a conversation starter for topics you care about. You will find inspiration on how to get started in the description of the individual bedtime stories.

About privacy
An internet connection is required to download the fairy tales, but not for the reading itself. Speech recognition works completely offline, without wifi, on your device.  No data or voice recordings are stored or transferred anywhere. Your privacy comes first. In addition, you can read on the go or abroad without worrying about expensive roaming charges.

About our subscription
Readmio comes with a collection of free kids stories. It covers multiple categories (Folk tales, Aesop's fables, Christmas fairy tales and etc.) and age groups providing you with an instant value and a great way to try out the experience. In addition to all current and future tales, you get the opportunity to record your reading and create an original audiobook or download the story as PDF and print it. If you like it, the subscription option unlocks the entire Readmio library (currently more than 200 kids stories, that's multiple books). We publish new stories every week.

We believe that you, your family, and your kids will enjoy the app and have many magical experiences together.

*** Note: Readmio app does not work on phones with root access. ***

data.summary: Read to kids, we’ll follow along and automatically add sounds and music.
data.recentChanges: It’s winter, and we’re doing our best to keep Readmio from freezing. But that’s not all - we’ve got a special early gift for every free user out there. You can unlock one story that will be yours forever. What are you waiting for? Open your gift now!
